items.title: Tabs, two-way bind, and a declarative action
items.intent: Use when the user asks for settings, profile, or multi-step forms without navigation.

items.title: Data table + pagination driven by state
items.intent: Use when listing rows from state with page controls; extend with onMountAction + API_CALL for live data.

items.title: Conditional blocks, modal, and action wiring
items.intent: Use for confirmations, banners, and toggling visibility via SET_STATE.

items.title: Split layout with charts and KPI cards
items.intent: Use for analytics-style dashboards: charts read series/data from state.

items.title: Full-screen marketing + analytics cockpit
items.intent: Use for dense landing pages, launch consoles, or campaign dashboards: Page hero, KPI grid, segmented range, stepper, tabs, Area+Pie charts, accordion, SplitPane with filtered table + pagination, Drawer and Modal, CHAIN actions.

items.title: Simple marketing landing page
items.intent: Use for lightweight product/marketing sites: sticky nav, hero + code teaser, feature cards (Grid), pricing band, newsletter with ShowWhen success, footer; NAVIGATE anchors and CHAIN subscribe.
